CREATE TABLE version_test (id INT, description VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO version_test VALUES (1, 'Testing version() output');
SELECT version(), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM version_test) AS total_entries FROM version_test;
WITH version_info AS (SELECT version() AS current_version) SELECT * FROM version_info;
SELECT version() AS current_version, (SELECT MAX(id) FROM version_test) AS max_id FROM version_test;
SELECT v.current_version, a.val FROM (SELECT version() AS current_version) v JOIN another_test a ON a.val > 1;
SELECT version() FROM version_test WHERE description LIKE '%Testing%';
SELECT version() AS current_version, (SELECT AVG(id) FROM version_test) AS average_id FROM version_test;
